areaDetail.errorDescription: We couldn't load this area. Refresh the page to retry, or head back to the locations list.
areaDetail.itemsSoonDescription: The per-area item list lands once the items page (#1410) ships.

areaDialog.createDescription: Add an area inside a location — e.g. Kitchen, Garage, Office.
areaDialog.editDescription: Update this area's name or move it to another location.
areaDialog.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Try again, or contact support if the problem persists.

delete.areaDescription: Items already filed in this area will lose their area assignment. This cannot be undone.
delete.locationDescriptionWithAreas_one: This will also delete {{count}} area inside it. This cannot be undone.
delete.locationDescriptionWithAreas_other: This will also delete {{count}} areas inside it. This cannot be undone.

detail.areasEmpty: No areas yet. Add one to start organising what's stored in this location.
detail.errorDescription: We couldn't load this location. Refresh the page to retry, or head back to the list.

dialog.addressHelp: Optional. A street address, room location, or any free-text note.
dialog.createDescription: Add a new physical location to your group — house, garage, storage unit, anywhere you keep things.
dialog.editDescription: Update the name or address for this location.
dialog.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Try again, or contact support if the problem persists.

list.emptyDescription: Locations are the physical places you keep things — houses, units, vehicles, anywhere your items live. Add your first one to start organising.
list.errorDescription: We couldn't load your locations. Refresh the page to retry, or contact support if the problem keeps happening.
list.heading: Locations
list.subtitle: Where your inventory lives — physical places, plus the areas inside them.

toast.areaDeleteError: Could not delete area. Try again.
toast.locationDeleteError: Could not delete location. Try again.
